description_long: This object features a fantastical floating flower arrangement anchored on pointed, rocky platforms that appear to levitate in midair. The main flower is large and spherical, with densely packed, layered petals forming a pom-pom-like bloom at the top of a slender, winding stem. Smaller secondary blooms and buds are attached to the main stem and nearby floating platforms, creating a sense of organic growth and movement. The platforms themselves are jagged and conical, with a rough, stone-like texture, and are visually separated from each other, enhancing the floating illusion. The entire structure is rendered in deep blue hues, giving it a surreal, otherworldly appearance. This object would stand out as a striking decorative or artistic element in an urban park or fantasy-themed public space.
description: A surreal, floating blue flower with a large spherical bloom and smaller buds, anchored on jagged, levitating rocky platforms. The arrangement is visually striking and otherworldly.
description_view_0: The main spherical flower and two floating platforms are clearly visible, with a smaller bud hovering to the right.
description_view_1: The central flower is seen head-on, with the vertical alignment of the platforms and a prominent side bud visible.
description_view_2: The arrangement is viewed from an angle, showing the spatial separation of the platforms and the main flower's layered petals.
description_view_3: The main bloom is prominent, with the platforms mostly aligned behind it and a side bud floating to the left.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are densely layered in a radial, spherical configuration, forming a pom-pom-like bloom with overlapping and whorled symmetry.
